rust.workspace_status: broken: axum/tonic/tower/tonic-build/prost/askama/sqlx/opentelemetry referenced by crates but missing from [workspace.dependencies]; cargo metadata fails

language_stack.full_stack_summary: gRPC+REST full-stack: Rust (tokio+axum REST + tonic gRPC + prost/tonic-build codegen), Python (uv + grpc-python clients from same protos), TypeScript (bun, CLI extensions), Go (pheno-cli), Protobuf (buf v2 IDL with 4 v1 services). Confirmed full tokio+axum+tonic stack at the *crate* level; workspace manifest is incomplete.

README.evidence: README.md (3.5KB); notes: content reads as 'repos shelf' not PhenoDevOps-specific — but file exists and is non-empty

CHANGELOG.evidence: CHANGELOG.md with CalVer format, Unreleased section

CI.evidence: 43 workflows under .github/workflows/ (ci.yml, codeql.yml, fuzzing.yml, cargo-deny.yml, license-compliance.yml, policy-gate.yml, gate-check.yml, etc.)

SECURITY.evidence: SECURITY.md (709 bytes) with GitHub security advisory link

sota_gaps: Broken Cargo workspace: crates/agileplus-api, agileplus-grpc, agileplus-dashboard, etc. declare axum/tonic/tower/tonic-build/prost/askuma/sqlx/opentelemetry/tonic-build but [workspace.dependencies] in root Cargo.toml is missing these entries — `cargo metadata` fails

Stale root Cargo.lock: only 47 packages resolved (aead/aes-gcm/blake3 — root phenodevops crypto crate); missing tonic/axum/tokio/tower/hyper/prost entirely; needs `cargo update` against full workspace
Root README.md describes a 'repos shelf' polyrepo concept — does not describe PhenoDevOps, its crates, or how to build/test; needs PhenoDevOps-specific rewrite
CONTRIBUTING.md is a 288-byte stub — should follow the same template as PhenoProject/PhenoMCP
No OTLP/HTTP exporter wired in agileplus-telemetry (opentelemetry feature 'trace' present but no opentelemetry-otlp dep); observability data cannot be exported off-host
Proto surface is small (4 v1 services in proto/agileplus/v1/) for a monorepo with 23 agileplus-* domain crates; many crates (github, git, plane, nats) have no corresponding proto service
No released crates.io pipeline — release-drafter.yml exists but no .github/workflows/release.yml with `cargo publish` step
No unified cross-language test harness — Rust (cargo test), Python (uv run pytest), TS (bun test), Go (go test) run in separate CI jobs with no aggregate coverage reporter
pheno-cli (Go) does not consume generated gRPC clients from buf; should generate Go gRPC stubs and switch CLI to gRPC for core service calls (currently REST-only via HTTP)
No dprint / Prettier formatter — only oxlint (lint) and ruff (py lint) configured; no canonical form across langs
phenotype-router-monitor exists in repo root but appears orphaned (no other crates depend on it)
convergence_rationale: Single monorepo hosting 4 language runtimes (Rust/Python/TS/Go) all bound to a shared Protobuf IDL (buf v2) with codegen to Rust (prost+tonic) and Python (grpc-python). REST surface via axum in agileplus-api, gRPC surface via tonic in agileplus-grpc. This is the gRPC+REST convergence pattern — not a single web stack, not 'multi-stack' (no per-language sub-product), but full-stack convergence on a shared IDL.

action_items.title: Repair Cargo workspace: add missing [workspace.dependencies] entries and regenerate Cargo.lock
action_items.detail: Add axum, axum-extra, tonic, tonic-build, tonic-reflection, prost, prost-types, tower, tower-http, tower-http/trace/cors/fs, askama, sqlx, opentelemetry, opentelemetry_sdk, opentelemetry-otlp, opentelemetry-stdout, tracing-opentelemetry, sysinfo, tokio-stream, hyper to root Cargo.toml [workspace.dependencies]. Run `cargo update` and `cargo metadata` to verify resolution.

action_items.title: Replace root README.md 'repos shelf' content with PhenoDevOps-specific README
action_items.detail: Document monorepo layout (crates/, python/, ts/, proto/, pheno-cli/, phenotype-router-monitor/), quickstart (`cargo build --workspace`, `uv sync`, `bun install`, `buf generate`), architecture diagram (gRPC+REST via tonic/axum with protobuf IDL), and link to docs/.

action_items.title: Wire OTLP/HTTP exporter in agileplus-telemetry and propagate to agileplus-api
action_items.detail: Add opentelemetry-otlp with http-proto feature; construct TracerProvider with OTLP exporter; expose OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT env var; verify spans export in dev (stdout fallback) and prod (OTLP/HTTP).

action_items.title: Consolidate duplicate pheno-* Python/TS/Go subprojects into sibling repos
action_items.detail: Replace local copies in python/ (pheno-core, pheno-llm, pheno-atoms, pheno-mcp, phenosdk), ts/ (phenotype-config-ts, phenotype-dep-guard, phenotype-cli-extensions, phenotype-patch), and pheno-cli/ (Go) with path/git deps on the canonical sibling repos. Reduces drift and unblocks per-repo release pipelines.

action_items.title: Expand proto IDL to cover missing agileplus-* domains (github, git, plane, nats)
action_items.detail: Add proto/agileplus/v1/{github,git,plane,nats}.proto with services mirroring the Rust crate surface; regenerate Rust and Python stubs via buf. Required for true convergence — currently only 4 of ~20 domains are exposed via gRPC.

audit_metadata.scoring_formula: 10pts each for LICENSE, README, CHANGELOG, .editorconfig, CI, dependabot, CODEOWNERS, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, FUNDING (max 100); CONTRIBUTING deducted 5pts (288-byte stub)
